calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Answers To Post Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-08-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion to compel responses to post-judgment discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection to plaintiff's special interrogatories and request for production of documents within 21 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions of $336.30 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-04-2005 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-03-2005 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-27-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Marta Guzman, Esq., specially appeared for plaintiff. After Hearing, Proof of Service Order to Show Cause is ordered off calendar. (212) Proceedings reported by: Ann Mendoza (212)
